## Professional
* Incoming SWE Intern at Rivian And Volkswagen Group Technologies for Charging
* (No Formal Title) ECE Lab
    + Designing PCB for minimal breakout board for TI's C2000 (Altium)

## Hobbies And Such
* Studying the EV industry
    + Market analysis, vertical integration practices, etc.
* I play guitar (a lot of polyphia)
    + I believe that establishing efficient and effortless technique is key to
      unlocking the instrument as a second voice of expression
* Exploring quiet areas, enjoying the spring breeze while sitting under the trees
